surenseWebhookEvents.description: Available webhook events for Surense integration in Shelly's Make.com workflow

customer.customer.meetingsummary.accessed: A meeting summary has been accessed (Not yet supported - please contact support)
customer.customer.meetingsummary.approved: A meeting summary has been approved (Not yet supported - please contact support)
customer.customer.meetingsummary.deleted: A meeting summary has been deleted (Not yet supported - please contact support)
customer.customer.report.accessed: A customer report has been accessed (Not yet supported - please contact support)
customer.customer.report.deleted: A customer report has been deleted (Not yet supported - please contact support)

document.document.deleted: A document has been deleted (Not yet supported - please contact support)
document.document.updated: A document has been updated (Not yet supported - please contact support)
document.document.uploaded: A document has been uploaded (Not yet supported - please contact support)

lead.lead.checklist.item.updated: A lead checklist item has been updated

workflow.workflow.checklist.item.updated: A workflow checklist item has been updated

employer.employer.created: An employer has been created (Not yet supported - please contact support)
employer.employer.deleted: An employer has been deleted (Not yet supported - please contact support)
employer.employer.updated: An employer has been updated (Not yet supported - please contact support)
employer.harb.uploaded: An Har Habituah file has been uploaded (Not yet supported - please contact support)

dataproxy.dataproxy.aleph.approved: A data proxy request for Nispah Aleph has been approved
dataproxy.dataproxy.bet.approved: A data proxy request for Nispah Bet has been approved
dataproxy.dataproxy.hei.approved: A data proxy request for Nispah Hei has been approved

polirobot.polirobot.documents.received: PoliRobot documents have been received (Not yet supported - please contact support)
polirobot.polirobot.request.submitted: A PoliRobot request has been submitted (Not yet supported - please contact support)

swiftness.swiftness.e9100.completed: A Swiftness E9100 request has completed (i.e. all responses have been received from the companies) (Not yet supported - please contact support)
swiftness.swiftness.e9100.submitted: A Swiftness E9100 request has been submitted (Not yet supported - please contact support)
swiftness.swiftness.e9100.uploaded: Swiftness E9100 files (phishing) have been uploaded (Not yet supported - please contact support)

integrationNotes.supportedEvents: Events marked as 'Not yet supported' require contacting Surense support
integrationNotes.webhookSetup: Configure these events in Surense webhook settings
integrationNotes.makeComIntegration: Use these events to trigger Shelly's Make.com workflow
integrationNotes.dataMapping: Map webhook payload data to workflow variables
